```{r Import libraries}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false

#pak::pak("Brar/neoipcr@PartnerReport")
library(tidyverse, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(smplot2, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(scales, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(patchwork, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(gt, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
library(neoipcr, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE)
```

```{r Set up functions}
#| include: false

parse_locales <- function(x) {
  locales <- NULL
  # split language and territory
  lists <- strsplit(x = x, split = "_")

  for(parts in lists){
    ret <- list()
    if(length(parts) > 1)
    {
      ret$language = parts[1]
      remainder <- parts[2]
      has_language <- TRUE
      has_territory <- TRUE
    } else {
      remainder <- parts[1]
      has_language <- FALSE
      has_territory <- FALSE
    }
    parts <- strsplit(x = remainder, split = "\\.")[[1]]
    if(length(parts) > 1)
    {
      if(has_territory){
        ret$territory = parts[1]
      } else {
        ret$language = parts[1]
      }
      remainder <- parts[2]
      has_codeset <- TRUE
    } else {
      remainder <- parts[1]
      has_codeset <- FALSE
    }
    parts <- strsplit(x = remainder, split = "@")[[1]]
    if(length(parts) > 1)
    {
      ret$modifier <- parts[2]
      has_modifier <- TRUE
    }

    if(has_codeset){
      ret$codeset = parts[1]
    } else if (has_territory) {
      ret$territory = parts[1]
    } else {
      ret$language = parts[1]
    }
    locales <- c(locales, list(ret))
  }
  return(locales)
}

get_string_resources <- function(x) {
  handlers <- list('bool#no' = function(x) x)
  sR <- modifyList(
    yaml::read_yaml("../common.yaml", handlers = handlers),
    yaml::read_yaml("content/_sR.yaml", handlers = handlers)
  )
  
  yaml_path <- paste0("../common.", localeObj$language, ".yaml")
  if(file.exists(yaml_path)) sR <- modifyList(
    sR,
    yaml::read_yaml(file = yaml_path, handlers = handlers))
  
  yaml_path <- paste0("../common.", localeObj$language, "_", localeObj$territory, ".yaml")
  if(file.exists(yaml_path)) sR <- modifyList(
    sR,
    yaml::read_yaml(file = yaml_path, handlers = handlers))
  
  yaml_path <- paste0("content.", localeObj$language, "/_sR.yaml")
  if(file.exists(yaml_path)) sR <- modifyList(
    sR,
    yaml::read_yaml(file = yaml_path, handlers = handlers))
  
  yaml_path <- paste0("content.", localeObj$language, "_", localeObj$territory, "/_sR.yaml")
  if(file.exists(yaml_path)) sR <- modifyList(
    sR,
    yaml::read_yaml(file = yaml_path, handlers = handlers))

  return(sR)
}

get_localised_path <- function(file_name, language, territory) {
  yaml_path <- paste0("content.", language, "_", territory, "/", file_name)
  if(file.exists(yaml_path)) {
    return(yaml_path)
  }

  yaml_path <- paste0("content.", language, "/", file_name)
  if(file.exists(yaml_path)) {
      return(yaml_path)
  }

  return(paste0("content/", file_name))
}

include_localised <- function(file_name) {
  cat(
    sep = "\n",
    knitr::knit_child(
      text = readr::read_file(
        get_localised_path(
          file_name,
          localeObj$language,
          localeObj$territory)),
      quiet = TRUE)
  )
}

get_localised_country_names <- function(x) {
  x |>
    purrr::map_chr(
      \(x) {
        val <- sR$countryNames[[stringr::str_replace_all(x, " ", "")]]
        if(is.null(val)) x else val
      })
}

get_validation_exceptions <- function(x) {
  validationExceptionFile = coalesce(x, "validation-exceptions_ref.csv")
  if (file.exists(validationExceptionFile)) {
    return(read_csv(validationExceptionFile, show_col_types = FALSE))
  } else {
    warning(sprintf("Validation ecxeption file not found: '%s'", validationExceptionFile))
    return(FALSE)
  }
}

get_connection_options <- function(x) {
  token <- coalesce(x, Sys.getenv("NEOIPC_DHIS2_TOKEN", unset = NA))
  session_id <- Sys.getenv("NEOIPC_DHIS2_SESSION_ID", unset = NA)
  if(!is.na(session_id)) {
    return(dhis2_connection_options(session_id = session_id))
  } else if (!is.na(token)) {
    return(dhis2_connection_options(token = token))
  } else {
    return(dhis2_connection_options())
  }
}

get_dataset_options <- function(
    reportingPeriodFrom,
    reportingPeriodTo,
    birthWeightFrom,
    birthWeightTo,
    gestationWeeksFrom,
    gestationWeeksTo,
    reportingCountries,
    testUnitFilter,
    defaultPatientFilter,
    validationExceptionFile
    )  dhis2_dataset_options(
      include_country = "yes",
      include_department = "pseudonymised",
      surveillance_end_from = as_date(
        coalesce(reportingPeriodFrom, "2024-01-01")),
      surveillance_end_to = as_date(
        coalesce(reportingPeriodTo, as.character(Sys.Date()))),
      birth_weight_from = birthWeightFrom,
      birth_weight_to = birthWeightTo,
      gestational_age_from = gestationWeeksFrom,
      gestational_age_to = gestationWeeksTo,
      country_filter = reportingCountries,
      include_test_data = !coalesce(testUnitFilter, TRUE),
      include_ineligible_patients = !coalesce(defaultPatientFilter, TRUE),
      include_invalid_patients = get_validation_exceptions(
        validationExceptionFile))

format_integer <- function(x, big_mark = sR$digit_group_separator)
  dplyr::if_else(x < 10000, format(as.integer(x), big.mark = ""), format(as.integer(x), big.mark = big_mark))

labels_bw <- function(x) {
  paste(
    format_integer(x),
    sR$gramm_abbreviation,
    sep = sR$unit_separator)
}
breaks_bw <- function(x) {
  pretty(
    x,
    as.integer(
      (as.integer(x[2]) + 1 - as.integer(x[1])) / 100)
    )
}
labels_wk <- function(x) {
  paste(
    format(
      as.integer(x / 7),
      big.mark = sR$digit_group_separator
      ),
    sR$week_abbreviation,
    sep = sR$unit_separator)
}

breaks_wk <- function(x) {
  pretty(
    x / 7,
    as.integer((as.integer(x[2] / 7) + 1 - as.integer(x[1] / 7)) / 2)
    ) * 7
}

```

```{r Initialise locale dependent information}
#| include: false

locale <- Sys.getenv("LC_ALL")
localeObj <- parse_locales(locale)[[1]]
invisible(Sys.setlocale(category = "LC_ALL", locale = locale))
invisible(Sys.setLanguage(localeObj$language))
if(is.null(localeObj$territory)){
  locale_gt <- localeObj$language
  locale_stringi <- localeObj$language
} else {
  locale_gt <- paste0(localeObj$language, "-", localeObj$territory)
  locale_stringi <- paste0(localeObj$language, "_", localeObj$territory)
}
options(`gt.locale` = locale_gt)

sR <- get_string_resources(localeObj)
```

```{r Importing data}
#| include: false

if(!exists("params")) params <- list()

if (!is.null(params$ReferenceDataFile)) {
  if (!file.exists(params$ReferenceDataFile))
    stop(sprintf("The file '%s' does not exist.", params$ReferenceDataFile))
  reference_data <- jsonlite::unserializeJSON(
    readChar(
        params$ReferenceDataFile,
        file.info(params$ReferenceDataFile)$size))
} else {
  reference_data <- suppressWarnings(import_dhis2(
    connection_options = get_connection_options(params$token),
    dataset_options = get_dataset_options(
      reportingPeriodFrom = params$reportingPeriodFrom,
      reportingPeriodTo = params$reportingPeriodTo,
      birthWeightFrom = params$birthWeightFrom,
      birthWeightTo = params$birthWeightTo,
      gestationWeeksFrom = params$gestationWeeksFrom,
      gestationWeeksTo = params$gestationWeeksTo,
      reportingCountries = params$reportingCountries,
      testUnitFilter = params$testUnitFilter,
      defaultPatientFilter = params$defaultPatientFilter,
      validationExceptionFile = params$validationExceptionFile))) |>
    neoipcr::calculate_reference_data()
}

```

```{r Preparing localised data}
#| include: false

dR <- list(
  creationTimestamp = format(
    lubridate::now("UTC"),
    format = "%x %X",
    tz = "UTC",
    usetz = TRUE),
  dataUpToTimestamp = format(
    reference_data$metadata$data_up_to,
    format = "%x %X",
    tz = "UTC",
    usetz = TRUE),
  analysisPeriod = paste(
    format(
      reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$surveillance_end_from,
      format = "%x"),
    format(
      min(
        as_date(reference_data$metadata$data_up_to),
        reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$surveillance_end_to
        ),
      format = "%x"
      ),
    sep = " - "),
  countriesList = paste0(
    reference_data$metadata$countries |>
      as.character() |>
      get_localised_country_names() |>
      stringr::str_sort(locale = locale_stringi),
    collapse = ", "),
  birthweightFilter = if(
    is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_from) &&
    is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_to)) {
      sR$headerList$allBirthweights
    } else if(
      is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_from)) {
      paste0(
        c(
          "≤ ",
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_to),
          " g"),
        collapse = "")
    } else if(
      is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_to)) {
      paste0(
        c(
          "≥ ",
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_from),
          " g"),
        collapse = "")
    } else {
      paste0(
        c(
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_from),
          " g - ",
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$birth_weight_to),
          " g"),
        collapse = "")
    },
  gestationalAgeFilter = if(
    is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_from) &&
    is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_to)) {
      sR$headerList$allGestationalAges
    } else if(
      is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_from)) {
      paste0(
        c(
          "≤ ",
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_to),
          " w"),
        collapse = "")
    } else if(
      is.null(reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_to)) {
      paste0(
        c(
          "≥ ",
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_from),
          " w"),
        collapse = "")
    } else {
      paste0(
        c(
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_from),
          " w - ",
          format_integer(
            reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$gestational_age_to),
          " w"),
        collapse = "")
    },
  numberOfDepartments = format_integer(reference_data$n_departments),
  numberOfPatients = format_integer(reference_data$n_patients$total),
  numberOfAdmissions = format_integer(reference_data$n_enrollments$total),
  sumOfPatientDays = format_integer(reference_data$n_patient_days$total),
  averageSurveillancePeriod = format(
    reference_data$n_patient_days$total / reference_data$n_patients$total,
    digits = 2,
    nsmall = 1,
    scientific = FALSE),
  numberOfSevereInfections = format_integer(
    reference_data$incidence_density_rate_table |>
      dplyr::filter(inf == "si") |>
      dplyr::pull("n")),
  averageSevereInfectionsPerPatient = format(
    (
      (reference_data$incidence_density_rate_table |>
         dplyr::filter(inf == "si") |>
         dplyr::pull("n")) /
        reference_data$n_patients$total),
    digits = 2,
    nsmall = 1,
    scientific = FALSE)
)

```

```{r Set up NeoIPC layout}
#| include: false

NeoIPC_pallette <- c("#FF9015","#0083C1","#0D4F6C","#E6FAFC","#E0D3DE","#1F271B")
pal <- c(NeoIPC_pallette[5],NeoIPC_pallette[2],NeoIPC_pallette[6])

```
